metadata.significance: Describes Allah's favors to the Prophet including expanding his chest and removing his burden

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ أَلَمْ نَشْرَحْ لَكَ صَدْرَكَ

translations.en_sahih: Did We not expand for you, [O Muhammad], your breast?
translations.en_yusufali: Have We not expanded thee thy breast?-
translations.ms_basmeih: Bukankah Kami telah melapangkan bagimu: dadamu (wahai Muhammad serta mengisinya dengan iman dan hidayah petunjuk) ?

translations.en_sahih: And We removed from you your burden
translations.en_yusufali: And removed from thee thy burden
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami telah meringankan daripadamu: bebanmu (menyiarkan Islam) -

translations.en_sahih: Which had weighed upon your back
translations.en_yusufali: The which did gall thy back?-
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang memberati tanggunganmu, (dengan memberikan berbagai kemudahan dalam melaksanakannya)?

translations.en_sahih: And raised high for you your repute.
translations.en_yusufali: And raised high the esteem (in which) thou (art held)?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami telah meninggikan bagimu: sebutan namamu (dengan mengurniakan pangkat Nabi dan berbagai kemuliaan)?

translations.en_sahih: For indeed, with hardship [will be] ease.
translations.en_yusufali: So, verily, with every difficulty, there is relief:
translations.ms_basmeih: Oleh itu, maka (tetapkanlah kepercayaanmu) bahawa sesungguhnya tiap-tiap kesukaran disertai kemudahan,

translations.en_yusufali: Verily, with every difficulty there is relief.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Sekali lagi ditegaskan): bahawa sesungguhnya tiap-tiap kesukaran disertai kemudahan.

translations.en_sahih: So when you have finished [your duties], then stand up [for worship].
translations.en_yusufali: Therefore, when thou art free (from thine immediate task), still labour hard,
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian apabila engkau telah selesai (daripada sesuatu amal soleh), maka bersungguh-sungguhlah engkau berusaha (mengerjakan amal soleh yang lain),

translations.en_sahih: And to your Lord direct [your] longing.
translations.en_yusufali: And to thy Lord turn (all) thy attention.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan kepada Tuhanmu sahaja hendaklah engkau memohon (apa yang engkau gemar dan ingini).
